title: 8 Herbal Cream Remedies for Parents to Heal from Grief
description: Passiflora incarnata creams are a natural remedy that has been used for centuries to help with grief. The plant, also known as passionflower, contains constituents like flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides that have a calming effect on the mind and body. These compounds help to reduce anxiety and stress, making it easier to cope with the emotions that come with grief.
